title: gnome-ponytail-daemon bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[0.0.11-5]
- Fix abort when disconnecting from libei
- Fix restarting the daemon state after a client has disconnected
  Resolves: RHEL-89455
full_text:
[0.0.11-5]
- Fix abort when disconnecting from libei
- Fix restarting the daemon state after a client has disconnected
  Resolves: RHEL-89455

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20396-0.html
